productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Casual Yellow Flats
description: Enhance the simplest of your looks with this slide from carlton london. Walk in comfort and high style in these slippers that exude eye-catching appeal. The footbed has been ergonomically padded and the forefoot strap is adjustable, which makes this one great buy that'll suit a variety of feet. Upper Synthetic leather forefoot strap with a buckle to customise Fit and lock the foot in place Cushioned footbed with ergonomically raised nubs for all-day comfort Outsole Lightweight durable PU outsole with dash grooves on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and traction Curved midfoot for inner-arch support Slipper care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
